'''Gilling''' was one of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] officers serving on the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Vak Somoril]]. He accompanied the Colonel in an investigation into a group of defecting [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Along with his partner [[Brock]], he was dispatched to [[Vak Somoril|Somoril]] to track [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]]. He was killed by the [[BloodScar]] pirates, who had interrupted his attempt to detain Jade.
